steps.expression: async () => { const originalGetView = window.api.settings.getView; const initial = await originalGetView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); if (!initial.ok) { return false; } const configuredProvider = initial.value.providers.find((provider) => provider.hasCredential || provider.lastSavedAtUtc !== null); if (!configuredProvider) { localStorage.removeItem('diagDisconnectProviderId'); return true; } const providerId = configuredProvider.providerId; const nextProviders = initial.value.providers.map((provider) => provider.providerId === providerId ? { ...provider, hasCredential: false, lastSavedAtUtc: null } : provider); const nextModelsByProvider = { ...initial.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider }; delete nextModelsByProvider[providerId]; const disconnectedView = { ...initial.value, providers: nextProviders, canRefreshModels: Object.keys(nextModelsByProvider).length > 0, modelCatalog: { ...initial.value.modelCatalog, snapshotId: `diag-disconnect-${Date.now()}`, modelsByProvider: nextModelsByProvider } }; window.api.providers.disconnect = async () => ({ ok: true, value: { provider: nextProviders.find((provider) => provider.providerId === providerId), modelCatalog: disconnectedView.modelCatalog } }); window.api.settings.getView = async (request) => request.viewKind === 'settings' ? { ok: true, value: disconnectedView } : originalGetView(request); localStorage.setItem('diagDisconnectProviderId', providerId); return true; }

async () => { const providerId = localStorage.getItem('diagDisconnectProviderId'); if (providerId === null) { return true; } const labelByProviderId = { gemini: 'Gemini', ollama: 'Ollama', openrouter: 'OpenRouter' }; const providerLabel = labelByProviderId[providerId]; const card = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.settings-provider-card')).find((element) => element.textContent?.includes(providerLabel)); if (!(card instanceof HTMLElement)) { return false; } const inputs = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('input')); if (inputs.length === 0) { return false; } const allReadOnly = inputs.every((input) => input.readOnly === true); const buttonLabels = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('button')).map((button) => button.textContent?.trim()); return allReadOnly && buttonLabels.includes('Disconnect') && !buttonLabels.includes('Test connection') && !buttonLabels.includes('Save'); }

async () => { const providerId = localStorage.getItem('diagDisconnectProviderId'); if (providerId === null) { return true; } const labelByProviderId = { gemini: 'Gemini', ollama: 'Ollama', openrouter: 'OpenRouter' }; const providerLabel = labelByProviderId[providerId]; const card = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.settings-provider-card')).find((element) => element.textContent?.includes(providerLabel)); if (!(card instanceof HTMLElement)) { return false; } const disconnectButton = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('button')).find((element) => element.textContent?.trim() === 'Disconnect'); if (!(disconnectButton instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return false; } disconnectButton.click(); const startedAt = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - startedAt < 2000) { const updatedCard = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.settings-provider-card')).find((element) => element.textContent?.includes(providerLabel)); if (!(updatedCard instanceof HTMLElement)) { return false; } const badgeUpdated = updatedCard.textContent?.includes('Not configured') === true; const disconnectGone = Array.from(updatedCard.querySelectorAll('button')).every((element) => element.textContent?.trim() !== 'Disconnect'); const buttonLabels = Array.from(updatedCard.querySelectorAll('button')).map((button) => button.textContent?.trim()); const inputs = Array.from(updatedCard.querySelectorAll('input')); const inputsEditable = inputs.length > 0 && inputs.every((input) => input.readOnly === false); if (badgeUpdated && disconnectGone && inputsEditable && buttonLabels.includes('Test connection')) { return true; } await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 50)); } return false; }

async () => { const providerId = localStorage.getItem('diagDisconnectProviderId'); if (providerId === null) { return true; } const endpointInput = document.getElementById(`${providerId}-endpoint`); if (!(endpointInput instanceof HTMLInputElement) || endpointInput.readOnly) { return false; } endpointInput.focus(); endpointInput.value = 'https://edited-after-disconnect.test'; endpointInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); endpointInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 150)); const latestInput = document.getElementById(`${providerId}-endpoint`); return latestInput instanceof HTMLInputElement && latestInput.value === 'https://edited-after-disconnect.test'; }
